SET tool1.summary =

MERGE (ta1)-[ta1_use_tool1:uses]->(tool1)

MERGE (techEmail:Technique {technique_id:'T1114'})
ON CREATE SET techEmail.name = 'Email Collection', techEmail.tactic = 'Collection'
ON MATCH SET
  techEmail.name = CASE WHEN techEmail.name IS NULL OR techEmail.name = '' THEN 'Email Collection' ELSE techEmail.name END,

MERGE (inc2022)-[inc2022_t1114:used_technique]->(techEmail)

  inc2022_t1114.details = 'Hyperscrape used to quietly extract emails from victim mailboxes.',

  inc2022_t1114.source_id = 'text:apt35-summary'
